name: @vt/daemon-lifecycle
description: Daemon ownership lifecycle primitives shared by vt-graphd (graph-db-server/client) and vt-daemon. Parent-pid watchdog, owner-record I/O, decideOwnerAction + evidence types, spawn lock, cooldown breadcrumb, process liveness probes, health identity probe, generic spawnDaemon, error shapes, diagnostics bus. Parameterised over DaemonKind so a single vault can host both a graphd and a vtd owner.
